SpecializationOption.Name: {=tor_lore_dark_name}Dhar, Dark Magic
SpecializationOption.Description: {=tor_lore_dark_desc}Dark Magic, known as Dhar in the Eltharin tongue, is the most dangerous form of sorcery. It is not a single wind, but the amalgamation of all eight winds of magic crushed together into a single, devastating force. Druchii Sorceresses are masters of this volatile power, using it to wither souls and blast their enemies into oblivion.

SpecializationOption.Name: {=tor_lore_fire_name}Aqshy, the Red Wind
SpecializationOption.Description:
{=tor_lore_fire_desc}Ever-bright cinders and heat Consume and destroy like wildfire Subdue the blazing Bright magic But take heed, for it is fickle
Druchii Sorceresses who master the Red Wind are some of the most destructive and belligerent of their kind. A timely conjured tornado of violent flame and ash could be all that is needed to triumph over the enemies of Naggaroth.

SpecializationOption.Name: {=tor_de_spec_raider_name}Veteran Raider
SpecializationOption.Description: {=tor_de_spec_raider_desc}You have spent years raiding the coastlines of the world. Your experience has taught you how to lead men in the most brutal of boarding actions and how to maximize the plunder from every conquest.
